prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: repository logo mark, square 1024x1024
Primary request: Create a polished logo mark for an open-source Agent Skill Toolkit. It should communicate reusable skills, lifecycle, modular tools, and human-readable automation.
Subject: an abstract interlocking loop and small toolkit nodes, like five reusable capability blocks orbiting a central spark.
Style/medium: premium vector-friendly 3D icon rendered as a clean bitmap, modern open-source developer tool brand, not corporate stock.
Composition/framing: centered square mark with generous padding, simple silhouette, works at small size.
Color palette: deep ink, clear cyan, fresh green, warm yellow accent, white background.
Lighting/mood: crisp, optimistic, professional, high contrast.
Text: no text.
Constraints: no letters, no words, no watermark, no mockup, no laptop, no mascot, no human figure, no trademark-like symbol.
